title: Duyurular

Duyurular

Lisansüstü Eğitim Enstitüsü

Duyurular

Tezsiz Yüksek Lisans Öğrencilerimizin Mezuniyeti Hakkında / About the Graduation of Non-Thesis Master's Students

12
						Kasım

2025

Değerli Öğrencilerimiz,

üç yarıyıldır.

başarısız olup

programı tamamlayamayan

öğrencilerin

,

1 adet intihal (benzerlik) raporu

Teslim Adresi:

İletişim:

Enstitü Sekreteri:

mujgan.keskinkilic@okan.edu.tr

(1347)

derya.ozdogan@okan.edu.tr

(1318)

Dear Students,

The maximum period to complete the

Non-Thesis Master’s Program

is

three semesters

.

Students who fail or cannot complete the program within this period will be

dismissed from the University

.

Students who have successfully completed their credit courses and wish to

graduate in the Fall semester of the 2025–2026 academic year

must

submit the following documents in person to the Institute Secretariat by January 30, 2026, at the latest

:

Documents to be Submitted:

Thesis (Project) Evaluation Form

2 Hardbound (cardboard bound) Copies of the Project

2 CDs containing the Project in PDF format

1 Plagiarism (Similarity) Report

Declaration of Generative Artificial Intelligence Use

Submission Address:

Istanbul Okan University Mecidiyeköy Campus

Contact:

Institute Secretary:

mujgan.keskinkilic@okan.edu.tr

Assistant Institute Secretary:

derya.ozdogan@okan.edu.tr
